content.full_text:
To: Blanca Breeze  
Legal Division  
State Fair Practice  
P.O. Box 807  
Sacramento, CA 95804

Ed Abercrombie  
Planning Commission  
City of Atwater  
298 East Bellevue Rd  
Atwater, CA 95301

I wish to get your opinion on the issue of a conflict of interest in a Kiwanis Project during my year as president.

The club chose as a project during the 1989-90 year to put a picnic shelter in a local park. Being I was the president at the time, I did all the ground work for the project, along with 6-7 other members. After the project went through all the city commissioners & city council, the project started. Soon after, a person came out and had the project stopped. She said no EIR was performed. That has had the project held up for 2 years, and is now coming back to planning for review.

I would like for you to tell me whether I have a conflict on the planning commission, or do I have to push back. I have no financial interest in this project, and only only as Kiwanis President, I acted in behalf of the club. During the 1990-91 year, the new president did all the speaking and work on this project. As of October 1, 1991, the new president has assumed this job.

I hope to hear from you on this matter as soon as possible. The city just notified me it will be on the, October 30, 1991, agenda.

Bianca, I appreciate your help and interest on this matter, and hope for a prompt response.

Thank You  
Ed Abercrombie  

Planning Commission  
City of Atwater
